## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 12 seconds per flight higher in Romania. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Bucuresti Baneasa Aurel Vlaicu (LRBS) (74.1 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Iasi (LRIA) (22.5 seconds per flight).
